summary: F9 fix verify TEST_BLOCKED — NOT a 6th regression strike. Gemini frontend hardened between #660 (~10:58) and #661 (~11:30): submit handler now reads from Quill internal delta model (NOT DOM), and Trusted Types CSP is enforced. The execCommand insertText workaround that worked in #660 is NO LONGER FUNCTIONAL. F9 fix CANNOT be evaluated from this run — no StreamGenerate request was generated, per-stream check_completed reset path never exercised.

key_findings.1_NOT_6th_strike: This is NOT a 6th gemini3 regression strike — F9 fix is UNTESTED, not failed. Do not pivot away from F9 hypothesis based on this run.
key_findings.2_gemini_frontend_hardening: Gemini deployed frontend change in last ~30min: Quill delta model isolation + Trusted Types CSP enforcement. The #660 operational workaround is obsolete.
key_findings.3_tooling_gap: test-pc-worker skill needs updated injection strategy for Gemini's new frontend state.

recommendation.primary_diagnosis: Tooling failure (frontend hardened), NOT engine failure. F9 hypothesis still valid and untested.
